new_jobs.title: Data Management & Reporting Officer
new_jobs.description:
About OPHCD
OPHCD as an NGO is committed to providing quality services to the communities with an equitable manner. For this purpose, the organization has dedicated and expert staff in public health, Water Sanitation and Hygiene, education, community development, and volunteers who have been working in technical and managerial positions with national and international NGOs since more than one and half decade. OPHCD Management team (Technical and Operation Staffs) have both, in-depth theoretical knowledge and extensive experience in their fields.

Job Description
Job Summary
The organization implements multiple projects across different provinces of Afghanistan. Managing data effectively across these projects is necessary to ensure accountability, transparency, and strong program performance. According to this needs, the Data Management and Reporting Officer plays a key role in bringing together information from all project locations, ensuring that data is accurate, managed well, and translated into meaningful reports. The position also supports compliance with donor requirements and national regulations, including coordination with the Ministry of Finance.
Duties & Responsibilities
Information management
Lead and maintain data management systems across all projects.
Develop and improve tools, databases, and dashboards for tracking progress.
Ensure proper data storage, documentation, and protection in line with organizational and donor standards.
Data Collection and Quality Assurance
Coordinate with provincial teams and partners for timely data collection.
Review, validate, and clean incoming data.
Identify inconsistencies and follow up for corrections.
Conduct routine data quality checks and support improvements.
Data Analysis
Consolidate and analyze data from multiple projects.
Identify trends, gaps, and achievements.
Develop summaries, dashboards, and analytical reports for decision-making.
Donor Reporting
Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual donor reports.
Ensure compliance with donor requirements and deadlines.
Maintain reporting calendar and respond to donor feedback.
Partner Coordination and Capacity Building
Coordinate with implementing partners for consistent reporting.
Provide guidance, mentoring, and training on data management practices.
Compliance and Accountability
Ensure confidentiality and integrity of data.
Follow donor and organizational data protection policies.
Integrate feedback and complaints data into reporting.
Bi-annual reporting to Ministry of Economy
Support provincial project team to build their capacity for preparation of bi-annual technical and financial report submitted to the DoPH and DoEc at the province.
Follow up of these reports with the provincial project teams.
Uploading the approved reports along with all attachments in online reporting portal of the Ministry of Economy.
Preparation and submission of required documents.
Follow up on clearance processes and respond to queries.
Maintain organized records of submissions and approvals.

Job Requirements
Required qualification: Thos not meeting required qualification are not encouraged to apply
Master’s degree in Information Management, Statistics, Public Health, or related field
3–5 years of relevant experience in data management, reporting, or MEAL.
High level Knowledge of and evidence-based Experience of using SPSS, Power BI, DHIS2, Kobo Toolbox or ODK
Prefer qualification
Strong skills in MS Excel and data analysis tools is preferable
Experience with multi-province projects and donor-funded programs in Afghanistan preferred.
Fluency in English; proficiency in Dari and Pashto required.
Core Competencies
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
High attention to detail
Effective communication and coordination skills
Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines
Professionalism and ability to work under pressure
High level of integrity and confidentiality
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Timely submission of high-quality donor reports
Accuracy and completeness of data from provinces
Up-to-date dashboards and reporting systems
Timely Ministry of Finance clearance processes
Positive feedback from teams and partners

Submission Guideline
1.Interested candidates apply through the link Provided in Submission Email and Copy the Link and Pasted in the Browser.
2.OPHCD has zero tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA).
3.By applying to this position, you agree to all OPHCD policies regarding Data Protection and Sharing and also PSEAH

Submission Email
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf9Kx88pdKaq7osOsTdhPfzPPxpRZj2FeWKdbLPwV2MvYRzBQ/viewform?usp=header

details.Education: • Master’s degree in Information Management, Statistics, Public Health, or related field
details.Years of Experience: • 3–5 years of relevant experience in data management, reporting, or MEAL. • High level Knowledge of and evidence-based Experience of using SPSS, Power BI, DHIS2, Kobo Toolbox or ODK

new_jobs.title: Senior PHP / Laravel Developer (High-Level – Product & System Builder)
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Role Overview
We are looking for a highly experienced Senior PHP/Laravel Developer who has built complete real-world systems, not just features. You will work on complex business applications and improve architecture, performance, and scalability.
What We Expect
Experience building complete applications end-to-end
Work on production systems with real users
Strong understanding of business logic and API integrations
Ability to analyze, refactor, and optimize existing systems

Duties and Responsibilities
Core Responsibilities
Take ownership of backend development using Laravel
Clean and refactor existing codebase
Design and build REST APIs
Implement complex workflows (CRM, invoicing, etc.)
Database design, normalization and development
Optimize database queries and performance
Integrate third-party APIs and services
Write production-grade, maintainable code
Some other tasks will be assigned by supervisor.
Application layers knowledge and design application with representation, logic and API independently

Job Requirements
Required Experience
6–10+ years PHP development experience
Expert in Laravel
Experience building CRM / ERP / SaaS systems
Strong MySQL and API architecture knowledge
Strong system design and backend structuring skills
Required Tools & Practices.
GitHub
DevOps
Agile methodology
Must-Have Skills
Ability to design systems, not just code features
Microservice application development.
Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
Experience with large codebases
Clean code practices (SOLID, modular architecture)
Preferred
Payment integrations (Stripe, PayPal)
AI or automation experience
SaaS or multi-tenant systems
Experience as lead developer or architect

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their CV/Resume to: careers@afgtech.com
The email subject line must be: Senior PHP / Laravel Developer
Please ensure your application clearly highlights your relevant experience and qualifications.
⚠️ Note: This position requires the qualifications listed above. If you do not meet the essential requirements, we kindly ask that you do not apply .

expiring_today.title: Chief Information Officer
expiring_today.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

expiring_soon.title: Commercial Reporting Officer
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary The reporting officer is responsible for ensuring the accurate collection, validation, analysis, and reporting of all commercial data across key businesses, including Top-Up, Star Pay, and Shops. The role supports strategic decision-making, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement through reliable MIS systems and actionable insights. Duties and Responsibilities 1. Data Collection & Management • Lead the systematic collection of data from all commercial projects, regional teams, and operational channels. • Ensure data integrity by maintaining structured, reliable, and well-organized databases. • Implement data validation checks to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency across all reporting sources. 2. Reporting & Business Analysis • Prepare and deliver high-quality daily, weekly, and monthly reports for the Head of Commercial and senior management. • Monitor and report KPIs, sales performance, and regional performance metrics. • Conduct detailed data analysis to identify trends, performance gaps, and growth opportunities. • Provide clear, actionable insights to support strategic and operational decision-making. 3. Performance Monitoring & KPI Tracking • Track and monitor targets, and operational KPIs across Top-Up, Star Pay, and Shops projects. • Ensure real-time visibility of performance against defined business objectives. • Highlight underperformance or risk areas and escalate to relevant stakeholders for timely corrective action. 4. Cross-Functional Coordination & Support • Collaborate closely with product owners, main office, and regional teams to ensure timely and accurate data flow. • Provide standardized reporting formats, dashboards, and templates to support operations. 5. Process Improvement & Automation • Continuously evaluate existing reporting processes and identify inefficiencies or gaps. • Recommend and implement improvements to enhance reporting accuracy, speed, and usability. • Drive automation initiatives to reduce manual reporting efforts and improve data reliability. • Support system enhancements and digital transformation of MIS processes where applicable. 6. Data Governance & Documentation • Maintain proper documentation of reporting structures, data sources, and KPI definitions. • Ensure consistency in reporting standards across all business units. • Support audit requirements by ensuring data traceability and historical record management. Job Requirements Education • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Statistics, Data Science, or a related field • A Master’s degree or relevant certifications in Data Analysis, MIS, or Business Intelligence is an advantage Experience • Minimum 2–4 years of experience in reporting, MIS, data analysis, or a similar role • Experience in telecom, fintech, banking, or FMCG sectors is preferred • Proven experience in handling large datasets, reporting systems, and performance tracking Skills & Competencies • Strong analytical and critical thinking skills with the ability to interpret complex data • High attention to accuracy, detail, and data integrity • Ability to translate data into actionable insights for business decisions • Strong understanding of KPIs, performance tracking, and business metrics • Excellent problem-solving and process improvement skills • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis tools) • Experience with BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) is highly preferred • Familiarity with databases, SQL, or data management systems is an advantage • Experience with ERP/CRM systems and reporting dashboards • Ability to design and maintain automated reports and dashboards Submission Guidelines Application Submission Guidelines Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 10 May, 2026 to the link provided below: Submission Form: ( https://forms.gle/WNnFXjsFKYVzEGdC6 ) Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

expiring_soon.title: IT Officer NOC Engineer - Night Shift
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
To serve as the frontline guardian of Setaragan Mutahed’s high-volume Airtime Top-Up infrastructure and StarPay EMI. This role ensures 24/7 availability of critical financial transactions and telecommunication links. You will monitor production systems, mitigate real-time payment failures, and ensure that overnight batch settlements and EMI reconciliations are processed without error, providing a seamless experience for thousands of agents and end-users.

Duties and Responsibilities
• Continuous Infrastructure & Transaction Monitoring: Proactively monitor core infrastructure, server health, and network links. Use approved tools to track the real-time flow of Top-Up transactions and StarPay EMI payments, identifying any latency or drops in success rates.
• L1 Incident Triage & FinTech Troubleshooting: Perform immediate first-level triage on system alarms. For payment failures or "timeout" errors, collect critical evidence (API logs, transaction IDs, screenshots) and execute approved runbooks to restore service.
• Critical Escalation Management: Act as the primary point of contact during the night shift. Escalate high-severity incidents (e.g., core database downtime, ISP link failure, or payment gateway outages) to on-call Tier-2 engineers or vendor support (MNOs/Banks) according to the strict Escalation Matrix.
• Rigorous Ticketing & Shift Handover: Document every incident in the Jira/Ticketing system with high precision. Provide a comprehensive Morning Handover Report detailing pending issues, vendor tickets, and critical status updates to the daytime operations team.
• Operational Health Checks: Conduct routine checks on server CPU/RAM, disk usage, and service statuses. Ensure all scheduled automated jobs and security backups are completed, reporting any exceptions immediately to prevent morning backlog.
• Overnight Batch & EMI Reconciliation: Verify the successful execution of overnight batch reconciliation jobs between StarPay and partner banks. Manually trigger or report failures in settlement processes to ensure financial data integrity for the next business day.
• Network & ISP Coordination: Support basic network troubleshooting (link down, packet loss) affecting agent connectivity. Coordinate directly with local ISPs and MNO partners (AWCC, Roshan, Etisalat, MTN, Salaam) to resolve connectivity issues affecting the Top-Up platform.
• Compliance & Security Adherence: Maintain absolute confidentiality of sensitive financial and customer data. Follow strict Access Control Procedures and Zero-Change Policy—do not perform unauthorized system changes or configuration updates during the shift.

Job Requirements
• Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering.
• Experience: 1–3 years of experience in a Network Operations Center (NOC), IT Support, or FinTech operations role. Fresh graduates with exceptional understanding of Linux/Networking and a high sense of responsibility will be considered.
• Shift Flexibility: Absolute willingness to work permanent night shifts and remain alert during quiet hours to handle sudden, time-critical emergencies.
Technical Skills
• Networking Foundations: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, and troubleshooting tools (Ping, MTR, Traceroute, Telnet).
• Systems Knowledge: Familiarity with Windows/Linux environments, basic SQL queries (for transaction lookups), and monitoring dashboards (e.g., Zabbix, Grafana, or PRTG).
• FinTech Literacy: Understanding of API response codes (200, 404, 500) and the basic flow of a digital payment transaction.
• Documentation: High proficiency in professional English/Local language for writing technical incident logs and handover notes.
Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies
• Crisis Management: Ability to remain calm and methodical when multiple systems trigger alarms simultaneously.
• Sense of Ownership: A "pro-active" rather than "reactive" mindset; taking responsibility for a ticket until it is resolved or officially handed over.
• Reliability: Strict punctuality and adherence to operational procedures, recognizing that StarPay’s reputation relies on 100% system uptime.
• Communication: Clear, concise communication skills to explain technical issues to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 05 May, 2026 to the link provided below:
Admission Link: ( https://forms.gle/jANFWERiLvYSTRwc7 )
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

expiring_soon.title: Senior Accountant Or Finance Officer
expiring_soon.description:
About Rahat IT Solutions
Rahat IT Solutions is a growing company providing IT, Ecommerce and logistic services and business solutions, focused on efficiency, transparency, and scalable systems.

Job Description
Rahat IT Solutions is seeking a skilled and reliable Senior Accountant / Finance Officer to manage financial operations. The candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, handling transactions, and supporting business decision-making.
Key Responsibilities:
Manage daily accounting and bookkeeping activities
Prepare financial reports (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
Handle accounts payable and receivable
Maintain accurate financial records using Excel, Google sheets or accounting systems
Monitor cash flow and expenses
Ensure compliance with financial procedures
Support management with financial insights

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
Minimum 2–3 years of experience in accounting
Strong skills in Microsoft Excel (important)
Good understanding of financial reporting
High attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to work independently
Good communication skills
Candidate should be based in Kabul
Fluent in Pashto, Dari and English

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should send their CV via:

expiring_soon.title: کارشناس تحلیل ریسک و امور تجارتی
expiring_soon.description:
About Western ISP & ICT Solutions
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن فعالیت های خویش را در جنوری ۲۰۱۶ به‌عنوان یک شرکت ارائه‌دهنده خدمات انترنتی آغاز کرد. در سال ۲۰۱۷، این شرکت تیمی را برای مدیریت کسب‌وکار آی اس پی تشکیل داد و با شرکت‌های پیشرو آی اس پی و جی اس ام در افغانستان را همکاری نمود
این شرکت روی بخش آی اس پی شرکت سرمایه‌گذاری کرده و در مدت کوتاهی زیربنای لازم را برای فعالیت به‌عنوان یک شرکت آی اس پی مستقل ایجاد نموده و در ماه می ۲۰۲۲ جواز آی اس پی خود را از وزارت مخابرات و تکنالوژی معلوماتی – اداره تنظیم خدمات مخابراتی افغانستان (اترا) دریافت کرد
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات انترنتی با کیفیت بالا و هزینه مناسب در سراسر افغانستان معطوف نموده است
این شرکت با سرعت قابل توجهی در حال توسعه بوده و با کمک افراد متخصص و با تجربه به فعالیت خود ادامه میدهد. هدف شرکت وسترن ارائه راه ‌حل ‌ها و خدمات انترنتی برای تمام بخش‌ ها و سکتورهای افغانستان می‌باشد

Job Description
:تطبیق اصول / مقررات
تطبیق اصول/مقررات به روش شرکت ( معیارات ما برای عملکرد مسلکی) مسؤلیت مشترک همه جوانب ذیدخل جهت اجرای ماموریت شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن است. ما باید همیشه روش شرکت و ( اصول/مقررات) محافظتی را رعایت کنیم
طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد
:هدف اصلی این بست کاری
تجربه در تحلیل ریسک سرمایه گذاری(مالی؛ بازار؛ عملیاتی)؛ آشنایی با ابزار های تحلیل موضوعات ریسک تجارتی؛ توانایی بررسی قرارداد ها و معاملات؛ درک از بازار (قیمت ها؛ رقبا؛ عرضه و تقاضا)؛ مهارت گزارش دهی (بتواند ساده و واضح توضیح دهد)
:وظایف و مسئولیت ها
تجربه در تحلیل ریسک سرمایه گذاری (مالی؛ بازار؛ عملیاتی)
آشنایی با اکسل پیشرفته یا ابزار های تحلیل موضوعات ریسک

و سایر ابزار های تحلیلی MS Excel داشتن مهارت های عالی با
مهارت های ارتباطی قوی و کار گروپی/ تیمی
مهارت های ارتباطی و گزارش دهی
تسلط به زبان های پشتو، دری و انگلیسی
و انترنت ( MS Word ، Excel ، Access شامل ) مهارت های کمپیوتری
توانایی همکاری صادقانه و خالصانه، مسلکی و سازنده با دیگران بدون در نظر گرفتن ملیت، قومیت، جنسیت، مذهب، نژاد، قبیله یا سابقه ای فرهنگی

Submission Guideline
ارسال نمایید hr@wsp.af ایمیل آدرس: سی‌وی خود را به آدرس ایمیل
.ضمیمه‌ها: علاقه‌مندان باید سی‌وی ارسال نمایند
اسناد دیگر: سرتیفیکت‌ها و سایر اسناد حمایوی در صورت ضرورت بعداً خواسته خواهد شد
عنوان ایمیل: لطفاً نام بست مورد نظر همراه با وکنسی نمبر و ولایت را به‌ طور واضح در موضوع ایمیل ذکر نمایید

expiring_soon.title: Payment Collection Officer (Female is preferable)
expiring_soon.description:
About City Connect ICT Services
CityConnect is a Kabul-based internet service provider that has been delivering reliable connectivity solutions across Afghanistan for over 10 years. With a strong focus on quality service, customer satisfaction, and technological innovation, CityConnect has built a solid reputation in the market. The company is committed to expanding its network infrastructure and providing stable, high-speed internet services to businesses and individuals throughout the country.

Job Description
Payment Collection & Follow-ups:
Contact customers and visits to remind them of overdue payments.
Follow up on unpaid invoices and ensure timely collection of outstanding amounts.
Maintain proper records of collections and pending payments/ invoices.
Customer Interaction & Support:
Address customer inquiries regarding their bills, payment methods, and outstanding balances.
Negotiate payment plans with customers who face financial difficulties.
Provide receipts and ensure smooth transactions.
Billing & Account Management:
Verify customer account details and ensure billing accuracy.
Coordinate with the relevant authority to resolve any discrepancies.
Keep records of defaulters and escalate cases as needed.
Legal & Recovery Process:
Work with legal teams for the recovery of long-overdue payments.
Issue warnings and final notices to non-paying customers.
Recommend disconnection of services for defaulters.
Feedback & Coordination:
Work closely with the finance and sales teams to improve collection efficiency.
Provide feedback on customer behavior and potential risks.

Job Requirements
1. High school is required
2. Ability to handle difficult customers professionally.
3. Self-motivated with an ability to achieve 100% targets/ collections.
4. Must be quite enough familiar in Kabul City.
5. The candidate must be able to ride a motorbike in Kabul city for payment collections.
6. Strong negotiation and communication skills.
7. Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.
8. Basic understanding of legal procedures related to debt collection
9. Fluency in local languages i.e. Pashto / Dari is required. knowledge of English language is an Asset.
10. at least one year of experience in payment collections or accounts receivable (preferably in an ISP or telecom company)

Submission Guideline
Applicants meeting the above requirements are requested to apply for this vacancy through email stated above only.
Important Notes:
1. Please attach your CV and Tazkira for further screening purpose.
2. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for further assessment.

Submission Email
hr@cityconnect.af

details.Experience: Must have at least 2 years experience at Internet Service Provider Company
details.Education: 12 Grade or Bachelor degree is desirable.
details.Years of Experience: Must have at least 2 years experience at Internet Service Provider Company

expiring_soon.title: Training Facilitator (Networking Trainer)
expiring_soon.description:
About AWN
Following the Fourth World Conference on Women in Beijing, China, where Afghan women representing various organizations and United Nations agencies participated, the idea of establishing a unified platform for cooperation and coordination among Afghan women emerged. Inspired by global women’s movements and the need for collective action, these participants formally established the Afghan Women’s Network in 1995.
The Afghan Women’s Network (AWN) serves as a national platform that brings together women’s organizations and individual members to strengthen collaboration, promote shared learning, and support institutional development. It provides a structured space for organizations to enhance their capacities and contribute to community-based initiatives.
AWN maintains an active presence in multiple provinces, including Kabul, Herat, Balkh, Kandahar, Bamyan, Paktia, Nangarhar, Badakhshan and Kunduz, while also engaging members across other regions of Afghanistan. As an umbrella network, AWN works in coordination with its members to implement initiatives focused on community well-being, access to services, and capacity strengthening. The network comprises over 5,000 individual members and more than 150 member organizations.

Job Descriptions
Provide a clear understanding of networking concepts, definitions, and importance
Explain different types of networks (formal, informal, professional, community-based)
Introduce principles of effective communication within networks
Present relevant laws, policies, and regulations affecting women’s networks and civil society engagement
Train participants on interpersonal and professional communication skills
Teach strategies for building trust and maintaining relationships
Develop participants’ ability to communicate confidently in diverse settings
Develop participants’ ability to communicate confidently in diverse settings
Train participants on methods to attract new individual members and partner organizations
Provide tools for member engagement, retention, and participation
Support strategies for inclusive and diverse network expansion
Train participants on planning and conducting effective coordination meetings
Introduce meeting facilitation skills, agenda setting, and documentation
Strengthen follow-up and accountability mechanisms
Teach criteria and methods for investigating and analyzing networking needs
Guide participants in assessing the nature, scope, and effectiveness of networks
Introduce basic research tools (surveys, interviews, stakeholder mapping)
Train participants on effective communication through phone, email, and digital tools
Develop systems for information dissemination among network members
Promote clear, timely, and transparent communication practices
Train participants on how to engage with Network members, Civil society organizations, Government representatives (ministries, directors, advisors), Non-governmental organizations
Provide guidance on organizing and participating in meetings with key stakeholders
Teach strategies to establish and maintain strong working relationships with government and non-government organizations
Promote collaboration, mutual understanding, and long-term partnerships
Train participants on how to collect and analyze information to identify partnership opportunities
Support the development of alliances and coalitions for greater impact
Strengthen participants’ ability to advocate collectively for women’s rights and empowerment
Expected Outcomes
By the end of the training, participants will:
Understand key networking concepts and strategies
Communicate effectively within and outside their networks
Build and expand professional relationships
Organize and manage coordination meetings
Engage with stakeholders confidently
Develop partnerships, alliances, and coalitions to improve women’s lives

Job Requirements
Bachelor degree in social science preferably in Law, Islamic Studies, Business, Economics, Management or any other related field;
At least Three (3-5) years of relevant experience in delivering training on Networking and partnership development, Communication and interpersonal skills, organizational or capacity development, Advocacy or gender-based violence(GBV)
Experience working with Civil Society Organization (CSOs), Non-governmental organizations, (NGOs)Government institutions
Experience in women’s empowerment, gender equality, or community development programs is highly preferred
Excellent writing and communication and analytical skills;
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex information in a clear and concise manner;
Proficiency in drafting reports, press releases, and official correspondence;
Strong understanding of Networking concepts, types, strategies, Stakeholder engagement and relationship building, Coalition and alliance development,
Knowledge of laws, policies, and regulations affecting civil society and women’s networks
Familiarity with research methods, stakeholder mapping, and needs assessment
Ability to design training materials, tools, and methodologies
Ability to plan, organize, and manage training sessions effectively
Time management and ability to meet deadlines
Experience in organizing coordination meetings and workshops
Proficiency in spoken and written both English and local language/s is required.
Understanding and knowledge of basic computer applications such as MS Words, Excel and data base management;

Submission Guidelines
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered. · Please mention position title on the subject of email · Applications meeting the above requirement will be entertained only. · Only the short listed candidates will be notified. Contact Information Interested candidates, who meet the above-mentioned requirements, should submit an up-to-date Resume/CV, with a Letter of Interest, via email to the following e-mail address: vacancies@awn-af.org - Late applications won’t be considered.

Submission Email
vacancies@awn-af.org/admin.hrofficer@awn-af.org/ faisalahmad.22p@gmail.com/ lemashams10@gmail.com
Apply

expiring_soon.title: کارمند معلومات (شفت‌های صبح و شب)
expiring_soon.salary: As per the Organization's salary scale
expiring_soon.description:
About Ariana Medical Complex (AMC)
Ariana Medical Complex, located in the heart of Kabul, Afghanistan, is one of the country’s leading and most advanced healthcare institutions. Our hospital is fully equipped with state-of-the-art medical and surgical technologies, offering a wide range of specialized services in a modern and patient-centered environment.
We are proud to be staffed by a team of highly qualified doctors, experienced specialists, and professionally trained paramedical personnel, all dedicated to delivering exceptional care to our community.
شفاخانه آریانا طبی کمپلکس، یکی از پیشرفته‌ ترین و معتبر ترین مراکز صحی در قلب شهر کابل می‌باشد. این مرکز با تجهیزات مدرن طبی و جراحی، خدمات تخصصی گسترده‌ای را در محیط معیاری و مریض‌ محور ارائه می‌نماید
ما مفتخریم که تیم ما متشکل از متخصصین مجرب، داکتران با صلاحیت و پرسونل صحی آموزش‌ دیده است که همواره در راستای ارائه خدمات با کیفیت به جامعه متعهد می‌ باشند

Job Description
هدف وظیفه: ارائه معلومات دقیق، مؤثر و قابل ‌دسترس به مراجعین در مورد خدمات صحی شفاخانه، راهنمایی درست مریضان و تأمین هماهنگی بین مراجعین و بخش‌های مربوطه، به منظور ارتقاء رضایت مریضان و انسجام بهتر روند خدمات‌ رسانی صحی عمومی شفاخانه
صلاحیت و مسئولیت های وظفیوی
وظایف تخصصی
ارائه دقیق معلومات در مورد خدمات صحی شفاخانه به مراجعین
توانایی افهام و تفهیم مؤثر به‌منظور رهنمایی درست و تسهیل امور مراجعین
آگاهی کامل از اوقات کاری داکتران و نرس‌ها و به‌روزرسانی روزانه آن
آشنایی کامل با مسئولین بخش‌های مختلف جهت رهنمایی درست مراجعین
ترتیب نوبت مریضان جهت معاینات و نگهداری کتابچه یادداشت به‌ صورت دقیق، منظم و پاک
وظایف مدیریتی
حفظ و نگهداری وسایل کاری مورد استفاده، ملبس بودن با یونیفورم رسمی و داشتن کارت وظیفه در جریان کار
جلوگیری از ارائه معلومات، معاش و امتیازات به سایر کارمندان و روابط غیرضروری با اشخاص غیرمسئول
خود داری از استعمال دخانیات در شفاخانه
مسئولیت فردی در قبال مشکلات مسلکی، اداری، خدماتی و امنیتی در جریان وظیفه
رعایت قوانین و مقررات شفاخانه و احترام به کلتور اسلامی و افغانی
وظایف هماهنگی
حضور در اوقات اضطراری، حتی در شب یا ایام رخصتی. و اشتراک در جلسات و کنفرانس‌های شفاخانه
آگاهی از شماره ‌های تماس مسئولین جهت اجراات رسمی
پاسخگویی مؤدبانه و به ‌موقع به تماس‌های مراجعین و مسئولین. همچنان جلب قناعت مراجعین به هر صورت ممکن
همکاری در ترتیب و تنظیم دوسیه ‌های مریضان
مطرح کردن مشکلات، نظریات و پیشنهادات سالم و مؤثر در وقت مناسب
تحکیم روابط کاری حسنه با همکاران
همکاری همه‌جانبه با اداره شفاخانه در بخش وظایف محوله و گزارش‌دهی مشکلات به مسئولین مربوطه در وقت مناسب

Job Requirements
تجربه کاری : حداقل 2 سال تجربه کاری مرتبط در بخش معلومات، پذیرش یا خدمات مشتریان در مؤسسات صحی، ادارات دولتی
رشته تحصیلی: دارای سند تحصیلی لیسانس در رشته ‌های اداره و مدیریت، روابط عمومی، یا رشته‌های مرتبط باشند
مهارت‌ها : تسلط کامل بر لسان های دری و پشتو همچنان انگلیسی امتیاز محسوب می شود. توانایی برقراری ارتباط مؤثر با مراجعین و همکاران. آشنایی با اصول خدمات‌رسانی به مشتری. مهارت در استفاده از کمپیوتر و سیستم‌های دیتابیس . توانایی مدیریت وقت و سازمان‌دهی امور اداری . برخورد مؤدبانه، مسئولیت‌پذیری و رعایت اخلاق کاری . آشنایی عمومی با ساختار و خدمات صحی شفاخانه

Submission Guideline
Interested applicants who meet the above qualifications are requested to submit their applications quoting the Job title and the Vacancy Announcement Number (AMC | HRD-843) in the subject line to email. The application must include the following:
Curriculum Vitae (CV)
Cover Letter
Educational Credentials (Diploma and Transcript are mandatory )
Applications that do not include the required documents by May 11, 2026 or fail to mention the Vacancy Announcement Number and Job Title in the subject line will not be considered.
Applications should be submitted to the email address below:
Email: HR@arianamc.com

Submission Email
HR@arianamc.com

tech_banking_jobs.title: Chief Information Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Senior Accountant Or Finance Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Rahat IT Solutions
Rahat IT Solutions is a growing company providing IT, Ecommerce and logistic services and business solutions, focused on efficiency, transparency, and scalable systems.

Job Description
Rahat IT Solutions is seeking a skilled and reliable Senior Accountant / Finance Officer to manage financial operations. The candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, handling transactions, and supporting business decision-making.
Key Responsibilities:
Manage daily accounting and bookkeeping activities
Prepare financial reports (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
Handle accounts payable and receivable
Maintain accurate financial records using Excel, Google sheets or accounting systems
Monitor cash flow and expenses
Ensure compliance with financial procedures
Support management with financial insights

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
Minimum 2–3 years of experience in accounting
Strong skills in Microsoft Excel (important)
Good understanding of financial reporting
High attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to work independently
Good communication skills
Candidate should be based in Kabul
Fluent in Pashto, Dari and English

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should send their CV via:
WhatsApp: +93 79 048 5571
Email: noorullah.developer@gmail.com
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Submission Email
noorullah.developer@gmail.com
